sections.title: AMRAP 17 minutes
lines: 200m is perform as 50 meters out, 50 meters back, twice.
*Sled and Sandbag should be empty or lightly loaded so that stopping is not needed for any 50 meter length. Carry the sandbag anyhow.

sections.title: 12:00 Zone 2 Cool Down
lines: Your Zone 2 today should stay between 160bpm minus your age and 180bpm minus your age.

sections.title: Warm up:
lines: Build from resting heartrate to 180bpm minus your age slowly over 12:00. This will feel incredibly slow, but will help your session a lot. Feel free to mix up machines, but end on rower.

sections.title: Cool down:
lines: Spend 4:00 on the rower, keeping your heartrate above 150bpm minus your age, then slowly work down to resting for the next 8:00 on any machine or walking.

lines: Perform a 3-second tempo to lower the bar on each repetition.
*Athletes may only use a deficit if they can get into a safe setup position AND lower the bar under control with a neutral spine. Otherwise, omit the deficit.

lines: Tempo Pull to Mid Thigh into Squat Snatch

lines: Control the negative for all reps, including final rep of set and heavy single.
